# create-forge-project-with-file
Description: Create a new project on the Forge platform and place a specified file within its directory structure.
Source: project
1. Access the Forge platform.
2. Initiate the creation of a new project.
3. Assign a desired name to the new project.
4. Once the project is created, navigate into its directory.
5. Place the required file(s) into the designated location within the project's directory structure.
